title: Fix escaped braces in close.Rd documentation
description: R CMD check NOTE: Lost braces in close.Rd at lines 32, 45, 59. Using double backslash (\\code) instead of single (\code). Need to fix roxygen source in R/labeled_vec.R.
close_reason: Fixed double backslash to single backslash in roxygen comments (\\code -> \code)

title: Document LatentNeuroVec re-export and H5NeuroVecSeq [[ method
description: R CMD check WARNING: Undocumented code objects: LatentNeuroVec (re-exported from fmrilatent). Undocumented S4 methods: generic [[ and siglist H5NeuroVecSeq,ANY. Need roxygen documentation for both.
notes: Fixed: LatentNeuroVec re-export now documented in latent_vec.R with @param and @seealso. H5File read_dataset method now documents @param type. R CMD check passes clean.
close_reason: Documentation complete - R CMD check passes clean

title: Fix undocumented function arguments in Rd files
description: R CMD check WARNING: Undocumented args in: H5NeuroVec.Rd (dataset_name), as_h5-methods.Rd (scan_name, as_multiscan vs scan_names, clusters, scan_metadata, cluster_metadata, summary_only), read_dataset-character-method.Rd (x vs file), read_dataset.Rd (type).
close_reason: Removed deprecated list method @param entries from as_h5 generic (scan_names, clusters, scan_metadata, cluster_metadata, summary_only). Added @param type to read_dataset generic. R CMD check now passes with 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 notes.

title: Argument mismatch in as_h5-methods.Rd
description: R CMD check warning: Undocumented arguments: 'scan_name', 'as_multiscan'. Documented but not in usage: 'scan_names', 'clusters', 'scan_metadata', 'cluster_metadata', 'summary_only'. The @param tags don't match the actual function signatures.
close_reason: Already fixed - scan_name and as_multiscan are now documented in as_h5-methods.Rd

title: Argument mismatch in read_dataset-character-method.Rd
description: R CMD check warning: Undocumented argument 'x'. Documented but not in usage: 'file'. The @param tags don't match the actual function signature.
close_reason: Already fixed - @param x is now documented in read_dataset-character-method.Rd

title: Missing Rd cross-reference for LatentNeuroVec in fmristore-package.Rd
description: R CMD check warning: Missing link in fmristore-package.Rd for '[fmrilatent:LatentNeuroVec-class]{LatentNeuroVec}'. The link references fmrilatent package which may not exist or may need to be changed to an internal reference.

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Verified fixed. R CMD check shows '* checking Rd cross-references ... OK'. This was resolved as part of the documentation updates.

title: Add .lintr to .Rbuildignore
description: R CMD check NOTE: Hidden file .lintr found at top level. Should be added to .Rbuildignore to exclude from package build.

title: Fix Rd cross-references for LatentNeuroVec
description: R CMD check WARNING: Missing links in LatentNeuroVec-io.Rd, fmristore-package.Rd, write_vec-methods.Rd. Need to add package anchors for [fmrilatent]{LatentNeuroVec-class} and [fmrilatent]{LatentNeuroVec}.
notes:
Agent: claude-opus-4-5. Starting work on fixing Rd cross-references for LatentNeuroVec.
Fixed: Replaced \link[fmrilatent]{...} cross-references with \code{...} and \pkg{fmrilatent} in R/latent_vec.R and R/fmristore-package.R. R CMD check 'Rd cross-references' now passes.

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Cross-references issue resolved. R CMD check now shows '* checking Rd cross-references ... OK'. The LatentNeuroVec documentation is properly set up with the re-export from fmrilatent package.

title: Remove neuroim2 directory from package root
description: R CMD check: Object files/libraries found in neuroim2/src/. The neuroim2 directory should not be included in the source package. Also causes hidden files and non-standard top-level files NOTEs.
notes: Agent: claude-opus-4-5. Starting work on removing neuroim2 directory and adding to .Rbuildignore.
close_reason: Symlink removed. Both .gitignore and .Rbuildignore already had neuroim2 pattern.

title: Remove non-standard top-level files

title: Undocumented argument 'dataset_name' in H5NeuroVec.Rd

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Fixed. The dataset_name parameter was already documented in the source. After regenerating with roxygen2::roxygenise(), R CMD check passes without warnings for this file.

title: Fix H5NeuroVec class slot documentation mismatch

close_reason: Added @slot dataset_name documentation to H5NeuroVec class.
